name: Sicilian Orange Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red onion, sliced into paper-thin rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the oranges and remove all the pith.
2. Slice into 1/4-inch-thick rounds.
3. Arrange the orange slices on a large, shallow platter.
4. Lay the onion slices on top of the oranges.
5. Sprinkle with shredded basil.
6. Drizzle olive oil over the salad.
7. Season generously with black pepper.
8. Cover and let stand at room temperature for at least 2 hours before serving to allow flavors to marry.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings (First Course or Side Dish)
